questions.question: What Asian nation's cremation rate is a record 99 percent?
What tasty substance did performance artist Karen Finley smear her naked body in, costing her an NEA grant?
What Russian rag shut down its presses for good in 1996?
What drug so impressed financier Alan Greenberg that he gave $1 million in 1998 to disseminate it to the poor?
Who was the only NBA player to score 25,000 points in fewer games than Michael Jordan?
What was the first perfume to boast the name of a fashion designer, in 1923?
